headline: How Hartford Insurance Group (HIG) Story Is Shifting As Price Targets Cluster Around US$150
summary: Several research firms have recently moved their price targets for Hartford Insurance Group into the low to mid US$150s range, while a model fair value estimate holds steady at US$150.85. Analysts link these targets to a balance of constructive views on underwriting and pricing, set against concerns about softening P&C conditions and rising loss costs in some lines. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting viewpoints and what to watch as the narrative develops from here. Stay...
